ogTitle: Upton Hill vs Upwey: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upton Hill and Upwey.
heading: Upton Hill vs Upwey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upton Hill, Victoria and Upwey, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upton Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Upwey (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upton Hill or Upwey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upton Hill has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Upwey scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upton Hill scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Upwey scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upton Hill or Upwey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upton Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
